creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-04-29 06:02:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Paranoid    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Paranoid is a collection of modules started out as modules which perform
  things (debatably) in a safer and taint-safe manner. Since then it's also
  grown to include functionality that fit into the same framework and
  conventions of the original modules, including keeping the debug hooks
  for command-line debugging.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Paranoid/
  
  PR:             ports/146077
  Submitted by:   Ju Pengfei <jupengfei@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3903    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/devel/p5-Paranoid/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Paranoid/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/p5-Paranoid/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/devel/p5-Paranoid/pkg-plist (new)
